recommendation.title: Full rest — TSB still down at -19.4
recommendation.reasoning: TSB sits at -19.4, past the -15 caution line, mostly carried over from Monday's swim-plus-commute day (once corrected for the full ~26km covered, TSS 31.3 rather than the 3.3 first recorded). HRV is 61ms, 9% below your 67ms baseline — mild, not alarming, but consistent with unresolved fatigue. Sleep was excellent (score 92, 6.0h) and resting HR is normal at 43bpm. Tomorrow is already a scheduled rest day in week 1 — that's the right call, no changes needed.
recommendation.sessionDetail: No training scheduled. Optional light walk or mobility work if you want to move, nothing structured.
recommendation.bikeNote: Easy bike both ways is fine — no session tomorrow, no reason to preserve legs.
